title: Shavuos Retreat in Vermont
short: A small house-weekend style Shavuos retreat with learning, meals, minyan, nature, and real community.
description: A curated Shavuos retreat in a beautiful private home in the Vermont mountains. Think indoors-first comfort, optional camping, learning that feels conversational, meals, minyan, games, nature, and a growing cross-border Jewish network.
included: Game room, pool, hot tub, nature, and flexible hangout time
A young Jewish network across cities and borders

title: Jewish Travel WhatsApp Circle
audience: Jewish and kosher travelers outside the +972 bubble
short: A safer travel circle for kosher info, local life, and real community wherever you go.
description: A reviewed-access community for travelers who need kosher travel information, local Jewish life, and practical support across cities. Built for people who travel and want reliable entry points, not random open links.
included: Kosher food and Shabbat planning help
A safer structure than random public groups

title: Local Shabbat Table
audience: Travelers looking for warm local connection
short: A future feature for vetted Shabbat meals, local hosts, and community introductions.
description: This is a placeholder concept page for a future Hamsa Nomads service: helping travelers find meaningful, safe, reviewed Shabbat experiences through local community partners.
included: Safety and fit review before sharing private details
